feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP BW Analysis Authorizations on the ADSO data?
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I would like to understand, if it is possible to have the SAP BW Analysis Authorization concept on the ADSO data i.e. without creating the Composite provider or query?

 

There is an external system connected to BW which directly access the ADSO tables to retrieve the data. It is required to enable the data authorizations on the ADSO data.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Transport from Development to 2 test Systems
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i have 1 Development System connected to 2 Test Systems.

I have transported all my objects to the first Test System successfuly. Now i need to transport all the objects once again to the second Test System.

When i try to do it, i get the error that the package is already assigned to the first Test System.

What is the best way to do this? 

I am aware of the Transportgroup, but i don't want to simultaneously transport objects to both systems because their purpose may differ in the future.

entry.title: DTP filter not working (ODP-BW/4)
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using BW modelling tools to create a filter on a DTP in order to restrict the hierarchies loaded to 0COSTELMNT in a BW/4 2023 system. The source system is an ERP System connected via ODP.  I restrict the DTP on field HIEMN and select the required hierarchies by name as presented by the modelling tools. When I execute the DTP all hierarchies are loaded from ERP.

Any idea?

Thanks and greetings

Markus

entry.title: Function module or method to query all base members from a BW hierarchy node
entry.content:
Hi. Is there any function module or method to query all children base members from a bw hierarchy? For BPC hierarchy I have the method IF_UJA_DIM_DATA~GET_CHILDREN_MBR, I need something that works like that, but for a pure BW hierarchy.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Function module or method to query values for a BW authorization variable.
entry.content:
Hi. I need a ABAP function module or method to get the values in a BW characteristic and hierarchy node authorization variable for a user.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: BW/4 Migration - issues Variables exit BADI
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are currently facing an issue during BW/4 Conversion when switching to B4H-mode.
We have implemented the new variables exit badi as described in SAP note 2458521.
In addition we also have deactivated the "old" CMOD customer exit method via SE18 but we are still getting the error message, that we need to switch to the new BADI enhancement spot method.

Message: Implement BADI RSROA_VARIABLES_EXIT_BADI instead of CMOD Exit or Variable
Old method is deactivated as in the screenshot below.

Also in the note there is the following hint

In the case of an inplace conversion, if the conversion takes place during an SAP BW/4 conversion, it might be the case that the customer exit is moved but is still listed as active in the SAP BW/4 check report. This is due to possible entries for EXIT_SAPLRRS0_001 in the table TFDIR and/or MODSAP. In this case, these must be deleted manually.

We have not found a possibility to delete the records from these tables so far.
How can we delete the entries or do we need to delete the funtion module direclty instead?

Best regards,

Benjamin

entry.title: BW query hierarchy node filter doesn't get interval members
entry.content:
Hi. I have a hierarchy node filter in my bw query where I filter by a specific node, that node has single members and some interval members. The query brings all data for all individual members in filtered node and its subnodes, but doesn't bring any data for interval members, I can just get values for interval members, when I explicit inform interval in my filter. So I would like to know if I can get the values for interval members in a hierarchy node just informing the node, as when we work with individual members, or really, I must inform the interval in filter when I whant to get it, even it already is inside the filtered node?

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Capture user entered DATE in QUERY as filter in a CDS VIEW
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to capture the entered DATE by user in a QUERY and use that value as filter in a CDS VIEW?

How to do it?

Thanks.

Loed

entry.title: Display the data of an ABAP program or FM in a composite provider
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to display the data of an abap program or an FM in a composite provider?

Basically, I wanted to show the data generated by an abap program in a BW QUERY WITHOUT STORING the data of the abap program to any table.

Is this possible?

Thanks.

Loed

entry.title: How create complex filter in BW query with more than one infoobject, 'and', 'or' operators, etc.
entry.content:
Hi.

How to create complex filters on BW query combining more than one infoobject with several operators like 'and', 'or', etc?

I just have managed to create filters for single infoobjects and just with values and hierarchy nodes.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: How to activate a BW query for OData?
entry.content:
I have created a bw query, it is working fine, and I have enabled it as OData with OData flag in query bw query editor. But when I go to add services in /iwfnd/maint_services, the service for my query doesn't appear.

So what is the exactly steps to enable a query as a odata service in sap bw?

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: List of all inactive objects BW/4Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

is there an option to find all inactive objects in a SAP BW/4 HANA system?
We are actually preparing an upgrade to SAP BW/4 HANA 2023.

Thanks for you help in advance.

Nina

entry.title: SAP ECC to SAP BW data transfer
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is data getting transfered from SAP ECC to SAP BW. In we02 we can see RSINFO and RSRQST. But these do not contain the finance data. But I believe SAP ECC uses RSRQST as a request to send the data to SAP ECC. Am I right in assuming this? Both systems are 7.4 version.

 

However I am unable to understand how is the getting transfered to SAP BW. I dont see any idocs in we02 or messages in SXMB_MONI. 

 

Please help me understand how the data flow happens, how to view the data flow is happening.

entry.title: SRM_VE_GROUPING / SRM_VE_WEIGHTING with BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hello, we are missing the transaction SRM_VE_GROUPING / SRM_VE_WEIGHTING in BW4HANA. Does anyone have experience with this.

Thanks

entry.title: CDS View used in End routine is not working when performing delta operation to DTP in BW4HANA.
entry.content:
CDS based View used in End routine is not working when performing delta operation to DTP in BW4HANA. FULL Mode of DTP is working fine. Unable to find the issue.

Here is the CDS Code,

AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZMM_DBV_XXXX'
AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
EndUserText.label: 'Effectiveness'
VDM.viewType: #BASIC

define view ZPM_CDS_BA_XXXXXXX as select   from XXXXXX as _a {
    _a./bic/zcpermit,
    _a./bic/zcshftdt,
    _a./bic/zcshfstim,
    sum (1)  as Cnt

} where _a.signedon <> '00000000'
group by
   _a./bic/zcpermit,
    _a./bic/zcshftdt,
    _a./bic/zcshfstim

entry.title: Extract data from DIRECT UPDATE ADSO using REQUEST TSN
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to extract data from a DIRECT UPDATE using the REQUEST TSN?

For example here I only wanted to extract the 2nd request which is the 2024-02-19 18:33:58.

Is it possible? How to set that filter?

Thanks.

Loed

entry.title: Numeric overflow for parameter/column (106) source type INT, target type INT2, value'455168
entry.content:
A database error occured. The error message in thedatabase was: "Numeric overflow for parameter/column (106) source type INT, target type INT2, value'455168'".

 

I need a solution please #sapBW

entry.title: Datasource having values in RSA3 while Hana Studio does not contain values in same Datasoure
entry.content: Datasource having values in RSA3 while Hana Studio does not contain values in same Datasoure

entry.title: Problem with SAP BW Query performance for Exception aggregation KPI
entry.content:
Hi,

there's a performance problem with a exception aggregation keyfigure “#items”

The system doesn’t make a "hana push down" to calculate the exception aggregation keyfigure "#items"

"# items" keyfigure definition =>

 

Result in SAP BW =>

  • Questions:
    • Is there no Push down bcs of the underlined keyfigure “YLBKUMH” (bcs of non cumulative keyfigure or the exception aggregation for this keyfigure)?
      • If yes, what we can do?
    • Is there maybe another problem, that there’s no push down to hana?

Thx for feedback

br Oliver

entry.title: BW4HANA - SICF - Maintain master data error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When we try to maintain master data, we receive the next error:

"App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.

Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#BWInfoObject-maintainMasterData?ignoreNavigationTargetInSearch=true&iobjName=ZREPOS&sap-app-origin-hint="

I think there is a service missing to activate, could you tell me which one it is?

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Antonio
